description: Property registration in India is undergoing a digital transformation with the National Generic Document Registration System (NGDRS). This government platform allows citizens to prepare documents, assess property value, calculate stamp duty, and book appointments online. NGDRS aims to streamline the entire process, making it faster and more transparent, reducing the need for extensive paperwork and multiple visits to government offices.

The $750 billion question: Report claims China fudged trade data to fool the IMF
description: According to the Council on Foreign Relations, the comparison relies on incomplete data and fails to capture the sharp rise in China's surplus since late 2024. It notes that China's reported current account surplus increased from about $400 billion to roughly $750 billion, while net exports contributed more than 1.5 percentage points to economic growth. During the same period, the eurozone's surplus fell from around 420 billion euros to 280 billion euros.

Higher LNG prices also impacted demand, with a return to more favorable rates expected to boost consumption. This crisis underscores India's energy sourcing vulnerabilities.

We must manufacture our own armaments."

Psychology tells why parents never stop listening for their child's voice in crowded room
description: Ever mistaken a stranger's voice for your child's? Neuroscience explains this common phenomenon. Our brains are wired to instantly recognize familiar voices, especially those linked to strong emotional memories from infancy. This deep-seated auditory memory, honed by early caregiver bonding, allows for rapid identification even in noisy crowds, showcasing the remarkable power of our memory and emotional connections.

The film releases worldwide on August 28, 2026.

Ashwin emphasized the need to differentiate between constructive feedback and personal attacks, highlighting that Sooryavanshi is still developing. He encouraged allowing the talented youngster to play freely, free from undue pressure, as he prepares for a potential India debut.

description: The innovative cell rejuvenation therapy, known as ER-100, is set to enter human trials, focused on enhancing the functionality of aging cells rather than attempting to reverse the aging process. This revolutionary approach shows promise in potentially decelerating age-related decline and addressing conditions like Alzheimer's. However, medical professionals advise caution due to ongoing research into long-term safety and efficacy, indicating a shift in understanding aging as a fixed outcome.

title: BJP’s lone Christian minister resigns: Who is George Kurian?

description: India's Sree Charani has become the No. 1 ranked bowler in Women's T20Is after an outstanding Women's T20 World Cup campaign. The 21-year-old tops the ICC rankings after taking 10 wickets in three matches, including match-winning spells against the Netherlands and South Africa. Charani displaced England's Linsey Smith, while Shafali Verma and Harmanpreet Kaur also climbed the batting rankings.

Police arrested a woman and her alleged lover for allegedly pushing her fiancé into a deep gorge. The victim, Ketan Vishal Agrawal, was lured to the fort under the guise of birthday celebrations. Investigators uncovered a conspiracy driven by the woman's alleged unwillingness to marry and her relationship with another man.

After Pakistan, now Bangladesh eyes China’s J-10CE fighter: Why it matters
description: Bangladesh is reportedly set to acquire 24 Chinese J-10CE fighter jets, a significant move for both nations. This deal, if finalized, would mark the second export for China's advanced fighter, following Pakistan's acquisition. The procurement aims to bolster the Bangladeshi Air Force's combat capabilities, replacing aging F-7 aircraft. This development occurs as China's defense exports face a downturn, with Asia being a primary market.

description: A shocking crime unfolded in Bengaluru's Seegehalli, where a woman and her boyfriend allegedly murdered her parents and younger sister. The brutal act, believed to stem from a personal dispute, occurred late Monday night. Police are investigating the elder daughter, Shwetha, and her partner, Keneth, as prime suspects in the gruesome killings before they fled the residence.

Tom Brady sends clear message after Gisele’s alleged Father’s Day snub
description: Tom Brady, the seven time Super Bowl champion, has had a pretty successful career but his past marriage with ex wife, Gisele Bundchen, has continued to dominate headlines even after years of their divorce. The Brazilian supermodel Gisele Bundchen recently made a controversial post for Father’s Day and it seems the NFL legend Tom Brady has made it clear what his current priorities are.

title: Lucknow fire deaths: How smoke, toxic gases and oxygen loss became bigger killers than flames
description: Doctors highlight that smoke inhalation and toxic gases, not just burns, are the primary killers in fires, especially in enclosed spaces.  These invisible hazards rapidly reduce oxygen and introduce deadly fumes, leading to suffocation and internal injuries.  While burns pose significant risks to survivors, the immediate danger often comes from the air itself, making awareness crucial for preventing fatalities.

title: Who is Geno Smith’s alleged Ex? Inside the claims stirring NFL attention
description: The New York Jets’ star player, Geno Smith, was gearing up for the next season when he found himself in major legal trouble after an alleged ex girlfriend accused him of domestic violence and being neglectful of a child just a few hours ago. The controversial accusations have sparked shockwaves across the league and many are curious about Geno Smith’s alleged ex girlfriend.

title: New Champions crowned, shocking betrayal headlines explosive WWE Raw Night
description: London's O2 Arena witnessed a dramatic WWE RAW go-home show for Night of Champions.  A beloved star turned heel, shocking fans, while Chad Gable faced his former stablemates.  Key bouts saw LA Knight triumph over Jimmy Uso amidst Bloodline interference, and The Street Profits capture the WWE World Tag Team Titles in a chaotic main event, culminating in a surprise championship coronation.

title: After laying off hundreds of engineers, GM now replaces more than 1,000 workers with 50 robots
description: General Motors has introduced 50 collaborative robots at its Michigan Factory Zero, reportedly leading to over 1,000 job eliminations. This move, aimed at cost-cutting and efficiency, sparks criticism from the United Auto Workers union, which views it as a threat to jobs. GM claims the robots support human workers, but the UAW president calls it a "fight for humanity" amid broader automation concerns in the industry.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn, makes 540 workers millionaires
description: A small-town US family has sold their Louisiana-based electrical-equipment company Fibrebond to power-management giant Eaton for $1.7 billion—and made sure their 540 full-time workers got a $240 million cut of it. Former CEO Graham Walker wrote a single clause into the deal: 15% of proceeds for the staff, none of whom held any equity. The average bonus works out to around $443,000 per worker.
